item.title: Sharing My FRM Part 2 Exam Tips - Passed with 111231
item.description: After serval months’ preparation, I passed the part 2 exam with 111231, and I would like to share my experience preparing for the exam, hoping to give some references to others. Qualitative questions weigh more than quantitative ones. From the feedback I got from the BT forum, the P2 exam has always focused more on qualitative questions in recent years. So you better understand the theoretical concepts in the first place rather than memorize formulas repeatedly and painfully.

item.title: Hello World
item.description: 👋 Hello World const a = 120; function t(x){ return x + 3 * a } console.log(t(5)) $$\sum^{10}_i X_iY_i + \prod MN + \sigma$$ I love Mac. We eten een boterham. $5ab \frac{1}{3}$
